statusPolicy.completedRequires: verified ending completion event/progression flag; none is mapped yet
statusPolicy.availableRequires: all mapped required route items present and no verified permanent block evidence present
statusPolicy.incompleteRequires: route is still possible by currently verified evidence, but required items, quest steps, or progression are missing
statusPolicy.blockedRequires: verified permanent block evidence proves the ending can no longer be completed in the current playthrough
statusPolicy.unknownRequires: insufficient evidence, including potential block evidence whose permanence is not verified
statusPolicy.details: Ending route analysis reuses verified Key Item analyzer results. Boss Memories, Memory ItemLot flags, and boss status are not used as ending completion evidence.

completionEvidence.details: No verified Shura ending completion flag has been mapped.

availabilityEvidence.source: EquipParamGoods row 2500: Lotus of the Palace.
availabilityEvidence.details: Community route guidance says the Owl/Iron Code choice occurs after collecting Lotus of the Palace and Shelter Stone.
Community route guidance says the Owl/Iron Code choice occurs after collecting Lotus of the Palace and Shelter Stone.
Aromatic Branch is received on the non-Shura branch after Great Shinobi Owl, so its presence is treated as a probable blocker for choosing Shura in the current playthrough.

blockRules.details: Aromatic Branch is present, indicating the save continued on the non-Shura branch after the Owl choice. Shura requires choosing to obey the Iron Code at that branch.

guidance.summary: Shura requires choosing to obey Owl and follow the Iron Code at the Ashina Castle rooftop choice.
whatStillNeeded: Use a save before the Owl choice or a later playthrough to choose the Iron Code route.
guidance.criticalChoice: Obey the Iron Code when Owl asks at Ashina Castle.

completionEvidence.details: No verified Immortal Severance ending completion flag has been mapped.

availabilityEvidence.details: Mortal Blade is a story prerequisite for the severance route.
Immortal Severance requires giving Divine Dragon's Tears to Kuro at the final choice.
Aromatic Branch indicates the save continued on the non-Shura branch after Great Shinobi Owl.

guidance.summary: Immortal Severance is the baseline non-Shura ending: stay loyal to Kuro, defeat the Divine Dragon, then give only Divine Dragon's Tears to Kuro.
whatStillNeeded: At the final choice, give only Divine Dragon's Tears.

completionEvidence.details: No verified Purification ending completion flag has been mapped.

availabilityEvidence.details: Purification requires Divine Dragon's Tears at the final choice.
Community route guidance says Father's Bell Charm opens the second Hirata memory needed for the Aromatic Flower.
Purification requires Aromatic Flower with Divine Dragon's Tears at the final choice.
Quest-context item; presence is reported but not used alone to mark the route available.

guidance.summary: Purification requires staying loyal to Kuro, completing the Emma/eavesdrop route before Divine Dragon, using Father's Bell Charm to enter the second Hirata memory, defeating Owl (Father), and giving Aromatic Flower plus Divine Dragon's Tears to Kuro.
whatStillNeeded: Obtain Father's Bell Charm through the Emma/eavesdrop route.
Defeat Owl (Father) in the second Hirata memory to obtain Aromatic Flower.
At the final choice, give Aromatic Flower and Divine Dragon's Tears.
guidance.criticalChoice: Stay loyal to Kuro at the Owl choice; complete the Purification quest steps before Divine Dragon.

completionEvidence.details: No verified Return ending completion flag has been mapped.

availabilityEvidence.details: Return requires Divine Dragon's Tears at the final choice.
Return requires Frozen Tears with Divine Dragon's Tears at the final choice.
Community route guidance lists Fresh Serpent Viscera as part of the Divine Child quest for Frozen Tears.
Community route guidance lists Dried Serpent Viscera as part of the Divine Child quest for Frozen Tears.

availabilityEvidence.source: EquipParamGoods row 9209: Holy Chapter: Dragon's Return.
availabilityEvidence.details: Quest-context item; absence is reported but not used alone as a route blocker until retention/consumption semantics are verified.
Quest-context item; absence is reported but not used alone as a route blocker until retention/consumption semantics are verified.
Alternate EquipParamGoods row for Holy Chapter: Infested; absence is reported but not used alone as a route blocker.

guidance.summary: Return requires completing the Divine Child quest, obtaining Frozen Tears, then giving Frozen Tears and Divine Dragon's Tears to Kuro.
whatStillNeeded: Continue the Divine Child quest until Frozen Tears are obtained.
At the final choice, give Frozen Tears and Divine Dragon's Tears.
guidance.criticalChoice: Complete the Divine Child route before the final Kuro choice.

unresolved.details: No ending completion event/progression flags have been verified. Completed ending status remains Unknown unless such a flag is mapped.
NPC quest-step flags for Purification and Return are not mapped yet. Inventory key items provide current item evidence but not every route-step or missability state.
Holy Chapter quest item retention/consumption semantics are not verified, so those items are reported as quest context and not used alone as Return route blockers.
